# R-YORS Command Flow Map
<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by SRC/tools/gen_docs.ps1. Do not hand-edit. -->

Generated: 2026-07-06T01:47-05:00

Scope: operational HIMON/STR8 source plus ROM support; excludes harnesses, proof apps, games, ACIA/PIA, and local generated-language images.

Scope: current HIMON command dispatch/resolve/run/return flow. This is a source-derived guide map for the hashed command path in `HIMON/himon.asm`, not a full call graph of every command body.

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    LOOP["prompt and wait<br/>MAIN_LOOP:253"] --> READ["read prompt line<br/>HIM_READ_LINE_ECHO_UPPER"]
    READ --> HAVE["line accepted<br/>MAIN_HAVE_LINE:270"]
    READ -->|abort or empty| LOOP
    HAVE --> PREP["set CMDP_PTR to CMD_BUF<br/>skip spaces / peek token"]
    PREP --> HASH["hash command token<br/>CMD_HASH_TOKEN:2694"]
    HASH --> FNVINIT["seed FNV-1a<br/>FNV1A_INIT:3201"]
    HASH --> HASHLOOP["walk token bytes<br/>CMD_HASH_TOKEN_LOOP:2706"]
    HASHLOOP --> UPDATE["update hash with byte<br/>FNV1A_UPDATE_A:3213"]
    UPDATE --> HASHLOOP
    HASHLOOP --> DONE["restore token pointer<br/>CMD_HASH_TOKEN_DONE:2714"]
    DONE --> SAVEHASH["save hash to exec state<br/>CMD_SAVE_HASH:2722"]
    SAVEHASH --> DISPATCH["dispatch by hash<br/>CMD_DISPATCH_HASH:2731"]
    DISPATCH --> SCANINIT["start catalog scan<br/>CMD_HASH_SCAN_INIT:2839"]
    SCANINIT --> SCANLOOP["scan records<br/>CMD_DISPATCH_SCAN_LOOP:2733"]
    SCANLOOP --> NEXTREC["find next FNV record<br/>CMD_HASH_SCAN_NEXT_RECORD:2869"]
    NEXTREC --> ENDCHK["check scan limit<br/>CMD_HASH_SCAN_END:2845"]
    NEXTREC --> ISREC["test FNV signature<br/>CMD_HASH_IS_RECORD:2883"]
    NEXTREC -->|none| MISS["no record found<br/>CMD_DISPATCH_SCAN_MISS:2751"]
    ISREC --> MATCH["compare hash0..3<br/>CMD_HASH_RECORD_MATCH:2902"]
    MATCH -->|no| ADV["advance scan<br/>CMD_DISPATCH_SCAN_NEXT:2748"]
    ADV --> SCANLOOP
    MATCH -->|yes| EXECOK["kind is executable?<br/>CMD_HASH_RECORD_IS_EXEC:2925"]
    EXECOK -->|no| ADV
    EXECOK -->|yes| ENTRY["entry = record+8<br/>CMD_HASH_RECORD_ENTRY:2931"]
    ENTRY --> SAVEENTRY["save entry<br/>CMD_SAVE_ENTRY:3139"]
    SAVEENTRY --> RUN["run command and capture return<br/>CMD_EXEC_ADDR:3146"]
    RUN --> CALL["jump indirect to command<br/>CMD_CALL_ADDR:3184"]
    CALL --> BODY["command body<br/>CMD_D / CMD_L / CMD_Q / ..."]
    BODY -->|RTS| RUN
    RUN --> RETPRINT["print return/register state<br/>MON_PRINT_RET_AND_REGS:1729"]
    RETPRINT --> LOOP
    MISS --> PRHASH["print unresolved hash<br/>MON_PRINT_HASH:1767"]
    PRHASH --> LOOP
```

## Return Contract

- The resolved command entry is the current inline HIMON command body at `record+8` for `kind=$00` records.
- `CMD_EXEC_ADDR` calls `CMD_CALL_ADDR`; `CMD_CALL_ADDR` performs `JMP (CMDP_ADDR_LO)` into the command body.
- The command body returns with `RTS`, landing back inside `CMD_EXEC_ADDR` after the original `JSR CMD_CALL_ADDR`.
- `CMD_EXEC_ADDR` captures A/X/Y/P/S and the saved command entry, calls `MON_PRINT_RET_AND_REGS`, then returns to `CMD_DISPATCH_HASH`, which jumps back to `MAIN_LOOP`.
- If the scan misses, HIMON prints the unresolved hash and returns to `MAIN_LOOP` without entering `CMD_UNKNOWN`.
